prompt: Elegant European street-style portrait of a young woman posing in front of a historic stone fountain in a Parisian city square. She wears a relaxed white oversized t-shirt, beige high-waisted wide-leg trousers, white sneakers, black socks, and a striped knit sweater draped over her shoulders, paired with a small black handbag. Soft wavy brown hair, natural makeup, subtle smile, shielding her eyes from the sun with one hand. Classic European architecture, flowing fountain water, trees and old buildings in the background. Bright daytime lighting, travel photography aesthetic, effortless French chic fashion, minimalist neutral tones, candid pose, realistic details, photorealistic, ultra detailed, lifestyle editorial photography, 35mm lens, soft natural colors, luxury travel vibe.
